channel.title: Guides on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Guides on Have an average day :|

item.title: The Completely Unsexy and Ever Updated Basic Guide to Keeping Your Computer Safe*.
item.description: Here it is, The Completely Unsexy and Ever Updated Basic Guide to Keeping Your Computer Safe*. Year’s of experience condensed into a single guide. It’s not going to rock your world but it might just make looking up content that could be considered questionable in polite society safer. *Safe – Like everything in IT, it depends. Safety is worthless if you don’t practice safe Internet. Also there are always new things coming out so safety is never 100%.
